_comment: Pi CLI configuration — edit this file to change Pi agent behavior. No code changes required.

providerRouting._comment: Regex-based routing for Gemini models. Evaluated in order; first match wins.

systemPrompts.terminalRules: When running terminal commands: (1) MANDATORY: use the Bash tool for every terminal command step — never use run_terminal_cmd, run_command, or alternatives; (2) use ad-hoc bash, not persistent shells; (3) when starting background servers, ALWAYS use nohup + disown: nohup bash -c 'cd dir && ... && python run.py' >> log 2>&1 & disown — Pi's Bash tool waits for children, so nohup+disown prevents the call from hanging;
